_note: TEMPLATE — copy to apply-defaults.json (gitignored) and fill in YOUR details. These constant applicant facts are auto-merged into any atsform.py `apply` config that sets "defaults": true. OPTIONAL semantics: a default whose label matches no field on the form is SKIPped silently (never a FAIL); an explicit config key that overlaps a default key (case-insensitive substring either way) suppresses that default, so the config always wins. Keys are label substrings — keep them SPECIFIC: a bare "Name" would substring-match a 'First name' field and fill the wrong value. Source of truth for your own copy: references/applicant-profile.md (also gitignored — create it from applicant-profile.example.md).

applicant._note: Demographic + education facts read at runtime by drivers (e.g. scripts/amazon_apply.py) so your REAL answers go into applications while this repo stays PII-free. Fill YOUR values in the gitignored apply-defaults.json copy.
applicant.gender: [your gender, e.g. Male / Female / Prefer not to answer]
